text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I run into a very tired-looking Vodka in the
academy hallway...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Ughhh... My body just feels so heavy lately...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I dunno why. I'm not staying up late, and I'm
eating properly...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
No, I gotta snap out of it! If I stand around
worryin' all day, it's gonna make me look lame!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta cool my head for starters. Maybe I'll go
splash some water on my face...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...She seems to be quite tired. We might want to
reconsider how many races we're tackling.
